creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #20)

poudriere jail -c -j 142arm64 -m http -v 14.2-RELEASE -a arm64.aarch64 -x

===========================================================================
=======================<phase: build          >============================
===== env: NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=nobody UID=65534 GID=65534
===>  Building for rust-1.83.0
Building bootstrap
running: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/bootstrap/bin/cargo build --manifest-path /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.83.0-src/src/bootstrap/Cargo.toml --verbose --verbose --frozen
qemu: uncaught target signal 4 (Illegal instruction) - core dumped
Traceback (most recent call last):

  File "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.83.0-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 1182, in bootstrap

RuntimeError: failed to run: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/bootstrap/bin/cargo build --manifest-path /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.83.0-src/src/bootstrap/Cargo.toml --verbose --verbose --frozen
